title: tephroseris integrifolia
intro: Tephroseris integrifolia, also known as the whole-leaved rock rose, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephroseris integrifolia are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
